creator: andr_ru@mail.ru
text:
Hi.
I have  similar problem: sometimes stop booting with log.
kernel: msk0: Ethernet address: ff:ff:ff:ff:ff:ff
kernel: msk0: No PHY found!
(See attach file.)
In bios activate two ethernet interface, cable plugin to first.
I dont no factors beginnings of problem. 
Power On, reconnect ethernet cable, change setting bios setup - not  follow  visibly problem.
I happy if help to you.
-
Hardware: m/b - Asus p5bv-c with last bios v.0403.
$ uname -a
FreeBSD linserver.localdomain 8.1-RELEASE FreeBSD 8.1-RELEASE #0: Mon Jul 19 02:55:53 UTC 2010     root@almeida.cse.buffalo.edu:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  i386
